use_cases: Display user profile pictures in navigation headers and sidebars
Show user avatars in comment sections and social feeds
Render user identity in card components and dashboard layouts
Provide graceful image fallbacks when photos are unavailable
ai_summary: A Radix UI-based avatar component featuring image display with automatic fallback support for missing or failed images. This minimalist atomic component uses Tailwind CSS for styling with a clean rounded-full design, making it suitable for user profile display across various interface contexts like navigation, cards, and social features.
